title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A Google DeepMind video retrospective marking the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo defeating Lee Sedol at Go in 2016. Thore Graepel and Pushmeet Kohli discuss how this match became a foundational moment for modern AI, enabling subsequent breakthroughs from algorithmic discovery to protein folding.
